steps.title: Join contrasting clauses
steps.content: The sentence contains two independent clauses: one about the Tsing Ma Bridge and one about the Golden Gate Bridge. The second clause contrasts with the first, so a coordinating conjunction such as but is needed.

steps.title: Choose comma plus but
steps.content: A lacks the comma needed before a coordinating conjunction joining independent clauses. B adds an incorrect comma after but, and C creates a comma splice by omitting the conjunction. The sentence needs comma plus but with no extra punctuation. The answer is D.
